channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: Easton’s Birthday Paw-ty & Campus Cupboard Reveal
item.description: Date: Friday, July 10, 2026 11:30 AM - 1:00 PM - Happy 13th Birthday Easton! Join Presidential Pup Easton to celebrate his 13th Birthday. Stop by to pet or just say Happy Birthday and enjoy ice pops! Our event is taking place in the new home of the Campus Cupboard, formerly the student pantry. Please join us in viewing the new and improved location. During the Celebration: Tour the newly renovated Campus Cupboard, learn about this important Student Support Program, discover ways to donate…
item.author: Community

item.title: Campus Cupboard (Formerly Student Pantry) Relocation
item.description: Date: Tuesday, July 14, 2026 1:00 PM - 4:00 PM - The Newly named Campus Cupboard, will open in its new location at 1525 15th street (OCC) on July 14th. Summer Hours Tuesday 1-4PM and Wednesday 9am-noon will continue till August 28th. Donation are always welcome. Drop off or email offcampus@rpi.edu to arrange pick up
item.author: Community

item.title: At a Fearsome Cost: 18th century New York and the Revolution exhibit
item.description:
In celebration of America’s 250th anniversary, the Institute Archives and Special Collections at Rensselaer Polytechnic Institute is pleased to present an online exhibit featuring original Revolutionary War documents from its collections. The exhibit is available at https://arcg.is/19CbPL5 A companion physical exhibit is on display outside the Institute Archives and Special Collections on the third floor of Folsom Library.

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Community
